title: ilex jiaolingensis
intro: Ilex jiaolingensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliolaceae, commonly known as a type of holly tree. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and viruses, as well as exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex jiaolingensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function, among others. In traditional Chinese medicine, Ilex jiaolingensis is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in capsule or tablet form to leverage its medicinal properties.
